data.name: Tie Me, Bind Me, HIT ME!
data.detailed_description:
This is a Kinky BDSM version of the classic card game Blackjack (21), where saying "Hit Me" to draw a card becomes literal. Get as close to 21 as you can without busting, count the cards, and take advantage of Kink Cards to change the odds and try to avoid getting "Punished".

THE TOURNAMENT

Welcome to Freyja's Rig. An oil rig, converted into a private casino & auction house, where five women from different parts of the world have consented to joining the "Tie Me, Bind Me, HIT ME!" Tournament in an effort to win the prize of having their one wish granted, but at the risk of losing everything and being auctioned off to an audience member.

ALL ABOUT BDSM

  • Fully hand-drawn visuals and fully voiced performances by real actors.

  • 5 Campaigns, one for each woman with their own story and wish (30min - 1h play time each).

  • 10 unlockable number card decks featuring artwork from different BDSM artists.

  • 16 Kink Cards that alter the rules and make things more kinky in the match.

  • 4 different bondage positions you see throughout the tournament.

  • Bonus Endless Mode, Gallery, Optional Gags, Challenges, and more.

About the price of a deck of cards, but kinkier, and can be played one-handed.

data.short_description: "Hit Me" becomes literal in this kinky BDSM twist on the card game Blackjack. Choose from five women, utilize kink cards to sway the odds, and win the ultimate prize of their wish being granted.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit
  • 處理器: 3.0 GHz or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 760 / AMD R9 270X
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 recommended
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64-bit
  • Processor: 3.0 GHz or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
